cv.metaDescription: Curriculum vitae of Manuel Heller, full-stack developer from the Basel region. Saveable as PDF, printed in the active ink character.
cv.name: Manuel Heller
cv.profile: Full-stack developer with five years of production experience in PHP and Vue, a background as a certified IT systems engineer (EFZ), and a trained eye for web design honed through photography and graphic design. Deeply invested in AI-assisted workflows (custom agents, hooks, skills, multi-step prompting) and convinced that continuous learning is not optional in the current tech climate. Team player with a quick grasp and the patience to turn a problem over until the solution is clean.

download.label: Save as PDF
download.hint: Prints in the active ink character. Switching themes re-inks the sheet.

bullets: Development on zvoove Core, an enterprise SaaS in the staffing sector: grown PHP codebase, modern Vue frontend, BFF API in between
API and interface tooling (PHP, OpenAPI, Yii)
Code reviews and architecture discussions in a ~14-person dev team
GitLab workflows, internal release management, Docker/Traefik dev environment
Teaching assistance in daily school life; activation program and care in a nursing home
Server and network administration, device management, IT service management per ITIL
Independently built an integrated display and info system with Scala Digital Designer
Degree: Swiss Federal Certificate of Competence

items.title: joggediballa.ch
items.description: All-in-one club platform: dynamic permission system, member and sponsor management (68+ sponsors), live Twitch overlay. Vibecoded, self-hosted.

items.title: manuelheller.dev
items.description: This site: GPU fluid simulation as the hero, Risograph aesthetic, four languages, statically exported to my own server.

items.title: Shot-Counter
items.description: Party scoreboard as a desktop app: QR join over LAN, realtime via server-sent events, atomic counter.

items.title: full-project-rework
items.description: Autonomous multi-agent codebase overhaul with analyzers, reviewers and implementers. Public on GitHub.

items.title: Vice president · Verein Jogge di Balla
